name: Molded Turkey-Pineapple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in 1/4 cup of pineapple juice. Let sit for 5 minutes.
2. Boil the chicken broth and pour it over the gelatin. Stir to dissolve.
3. Add the remaining cup of pineapple juice and chill until thickened.
4. Meanwhile, combine the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
5. Pour the gelatin mixture over the turkey and pour into a 9 x 5 inch loaf pan.
6. Refrigerate overnight or at least 4 hours.
7. Cut into squares and serve on lettuce.
1/4 recipe - 286 calories, 4 lean meat, 1 vegetable, 1 1/2 fruit exchange 27 grams carbohydrate, 32 grams protein, 6 grams fat, 86 mg sodium, 594 mg potassium, 80 mg cholesterol.
Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986 Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93
